hero.heading: Your basecamp on Lake Cushman
hero.subheading: A spacious four-bedroom cabin in Hoodsport, WA — modern comforts, rustic charm, and a private lake park one minute from the front porch.
hero.imageAlt: The MACS Cushman Cabin, an A-frame style cabin surrounded by evergreen trees

intro: Escape to this spacious four-bedroom home in Hoodsport, where modern amenities meet rustic cabin charm. The cabin sits in a private Lake Cushman community — the park with swimming area, dock, picnic tables, and boat launch is visible from the front porch, a brief one-minute walk away. Venture further and you're at the doorstep of Olympic National Park, with the Hood Canal, Hoodsport Coffee Co, Potlatch Brewing Co, Hoodsport Winery, and Lilliwaup Tidelands State Park all nearby.

featureCards.title: The Lake, Right There
featureCards.text: Swim, fish, or launch your boat at the private community park 150 yards from the door. One guest parking pass is included with your stay.
featureCards.imageAlt: Dock and swimming area on Lake Cushman at the community park

featureCards.title: Room for Everyone
featureCards.text: Four queen bedrooms, a kid-favorite bunk room, two living rooms with plush sectionals and smart TVs, and three bathrooms — one on every level.
featureCards.imageAlt: Main living room with sectional couch and wood-beamed ceiling

featureCards.title: Evenings by the Fire
featureCards.text: A paver patio with a fire pit, picnic table, and gas grill — surrounded by tall evergreens and quiet.
featureCards.imageAlt: Backyard fire pit glowing on the paver patio at dusk

park.title: Park & Boat Launch
park.text: The community park and boat launch are privately owned by the Lake Cushman Maintenance Company (LCMC), visible from the front porch and only a 150-yard walk away. Dock, boat launch, children's swimming area, picnic tables, and a lake fishing area.
items: One guest parking pass for the park is included ($150 fee if misplaced)
An LCMC pass is required to launch any boat — available by request for $50 per day
The driveway fits a pickup and trailer
park.imageAlt: Long dock stretching into Lake Cushman with forested mountains behind

goodToKnow: Check-in after 4:00 PM · Check-out before 11:00 AM
Up to 2 dogs welcome (pet fees apply)
No smoking · Exterior security cameras only
